title: Leeto la Lefa ho Pholletsa le Diprovense tsa Afrika Borwa
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 5 - Kgato ya Bohareng
slides.title: Leeto la Lefa ho Pholletsa le Diprovense tsa Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: A re tsamaye ho pholletsa le diprovense tsohle tse robong mme re fumane dibaka tse kgethehileng, dipale le meetlo eo e leng ya rona bohle.

media.alt: Mmapa o nang le mebala o bontshang moedi wa Afrika Borwa o nang le dintlha tse tshwayang dibaka tsa lefa ho pholletsa le naha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amohela baithuti mme o hlalose kgopolo ya 'leeto la lefa' - leeto la boiqapelo le emang dibakeng tse kgethehileng ho pholletsa le Afrika Borwa. Botsa: na ho na le motho ya kileng a etela musiamo, moaho wa kgale, sehopotso kapa sebaka sa tlholeho? Leeto la lefa le hokahanya dibaka tsena. Qetellong ya thuto, baithuti ba lokela ho kgona ho bolela mabitso a dibaka tsa lefa diprovenseng tse fapaneng mme ba bolele hore na ke hobaneng re di sireletsa.

slides.title: Lefa ke eng?
slides.lead: Lefa ke ntho e nngwe le e nngwe eo re e futang ho tswa nakong e fetileng mme re batlang ho e boloka bakeng sa bokamoso.

blocks.text: **Lefa** ke dintho tseo re di fumanang ho batho ba phetseng pele ho rona. E ka ba dintho tseo re ka di amang, jwalo ka meaho ya kgale le didirisiwa, le dintho tseo re ke keng ra di ama, jwalo ka dipina, dipale, dipuo le ditsela tsa ho pheha. Lefa le re thusa ho tseba hore na re bomang le hore na re tswa kae.

items: **Lefa la tlholeho** - dithaba tse kgethehileng, mahaha, dinoka le diphoofolo.
**Lefa la setso** - meaho, dihopotso, botaki le dintho tsa kgale.
**Lefa le phelang** - dipuo, mmino, ditantshi, dijo le mekete.

media.alt: Ditshwantsho tse tharo tse bonolo: thaba, moaho wa kgale le moropa, tse bontshang mefuta e meraro ya lefa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fana ka mehlala e totobetseng bakeng sa mofuta o mong le o mong e le hore baithuti ba Kereiti ya 5 ba kgone ho e nahana: tlholeho (Thaba ya Table Mountain), setso (Union Buildings), le phelang (ho bina isicathamiya, braai ya lelapa, ho pheta ditshomo). Hatisa hore lefa le phelang le phela ka bathong, eseng ka moahong. Mema baithuti ho bolela karolo e le nngwe ya lefa la malapa a bona.

slides.eyebrow: Dibaka tseo lefatshe lohle le di sireletsang
slides.title: Dibaka tsa Lefa la Lefatshe tsa Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: Dibaka tse ding tsa rona di kgethehile hoo lefatshe lohle le thusang ho di hlokomela.

blocks.text: **Sebaka sa Lefa la Lefatshe** ke sebaka se kgethilweng ke mokgatlo o bitswang **UNESCO** hobane se bohlokwa ho batho bohle lefatsheng, eseng feela naheng e le nngwe. Afrika Borwa e na le dibaka tse ka bang **leshome** tse jwalo, tse hasaneng ho pholletsa le diprovense. Leetong la rona re tla etela tse ding tsa tsona.

items: Tse ding di kgethetswe tlholeho, jwalo ka dithaba tsa Kapa le Drakensberg.
Tse ding di kgethetswe histori, jwalo ka Mapungubwe le Sehlekehleke sa Robben.
Ho ba lenaneng ho bolela hore sebaka se sireleditswe bakeng sa bana ba bokamoso.

media.alt: Baejete e chitja e nang le lefatshe ka hare, jwalo ka letshwao la Lefa la Lefatshe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Boloka tlhaloso e le bonolo: UNESCO ke sehlopha se Machabeng a Kopaneng se etsang lenane le kgethehileng la dibaka tsa bohlokwa ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng. Ha ho hlokahale hore baithuti ba tsebe palo e nepahetseng ka hlooho - ntlha ke hore Afrika Borwa e na le dibaka tse ngata tse jwalo. [SME] Ka kopo netefatsa palo ya hona jwale ya dibaka tsa UNESCO tsa Lefa la Lefatshe tsa Afrika Borwa (e ne e le leshome ka 2023) pele thuto e kena tshebetsong.

slides.title: Boemelo bo le bong ba lefa provenseng ka nngwe
slides.lead: Diprovense tse robong, dibaka tse robong tse tummeng tseo re ka di etelang leetong la rona.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind (Sekgele sa Botho) - mahaha a nang le mesaladi ya kgale haholo ya batho.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - mmuso wa pele wa Afrika Borwa le tshukudu ya kgauta.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bophirimela
blocks.text: Sehlekehleke sa Robben - teronko moo Nelson Mandela a neng a tshwaretswe teng.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Drakensberg - ditshwantsho tse dikete tsa majwe tsa Baroa.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bochabela
blocks.text: Qunu le Mthatha - dibaka tsa bongwaneng ba Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Kapa Leboya
blocks.text: Lefa la Baroa le dikgabiso tsa kgale tse betlilweng majweng Karoo e omeletseng.

blocks.heading: Foreisetata
blocks.text: Metse ya Basotho le Vredefort Dome e haufi.

blocks.heading: Leboya Bophirimela
blocks.text: Taung, moo lehata la ngwana wa kgale le fumanweng teng.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa tsa Barberton - tse ding tsa majwe a kgale ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng.

slides.notes: Sena ke seslaete sa kakaretso. Bala provense ka nngwe le sebaka sa yona ka lentswe le phahameng, mme o supe hore na e ka ba hokae mmapeng wa boiqapelo (kapa mmapa wa lebota haeba o na le ona). Bolella baithuti hore diseslaete tse latelang di tla lebisa tlhokomelo ho tse mmalwa tsa tsena. O ka botsa moithuti ka mong hore a kgethe boemelo boo a batlang ho bo etela ka ho fetisisa mme a bolele hore na ke hobaneng. [SME] Netefatsa hore ho kopanya provense le sebaka ho lokela tlelase ya hao; provense ka nngwe e na le dibaka tse ngata tsa lefa mme mesuwe e ka rata mehlala ya lehae.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind (Sekgele sa Botho)
slides.lead: Sehlopha sa mahaha haufi le Johannesburg moo bo-radisaense ba fumaneng teng tse ding tsa mesaladi ya kgale ka ho fetisisa ya lelapa la batho lefatsheng.

blocks.text: **Mahaheng a Sterkfontein** bo-radisaense ba epolotse **mesaladi** - masapo a fetohileng majwe - a batho ba pele ba phetseng dimilione tsa dilemo tse fetileng. Dintho tse tummeng tse fumanweng di kenyeletsa lehata le bitswang 'Mrs Ples' le lesapa le batlang le felletse le bitswang 'Little Foot'. Ke ka hoo sebaka sena se bitswang *Cradle of Humankind* (Sekgele sa Botho).

items: Sekgele ke moo lesea le robalang teng - kahoo sena se jwaloka sebaka sa tswalo sa batho.
Ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Lefatshe hobane se pheta pale ya batho bohle.
O ntse o ka etela mahaha le musiamo le kajeno.

media.alt: Karolo e sehilweng ya lehaha ka tlasa lefatshe le nang le lehata la mosaladi ka hare.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa 'mosaladi' ka ho hlaka: masapo a fetohileng lejwe butlebutle nakong e telele haholo. Little Foot le Mrs Ples di etsa hore saense e utlwahale e le nnete ho baithuti. Boloka kgopolo ya nako e telele e le bonolo - 'khale-khale haholo, nako e telele ho feta kamoo re ka nahanang.' Kgutlela karateng ya seslaete sa 5. [SME] Ka boomo re nolofaditse ditlhaku tsa nako; netefatsa dipalo life kapa life tseo mosuwe a kgethang ho di eketsa ka lentswe.

slides.title: Mmuso wa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Khale-khale, hodima leralla le nang le hlooho e bataletseng leboya ho hole, ho ne ho eme motseholo wa mmuso wa pele wa Afrika Borwa.

blocks.text: Dilemong tse ka bang 700 ho isa 800 tse fetileng, **Mapungubwe** e ne e le mmuso o phathahaneng moo batho ba neng ba lema, ba ruile dikgomo mme ba rekisa kgauta le lenaka la tlou le dinaha tse hole. Morena o ne a dula hodima leralla le kgethehileng. Ha morao baepolli ba fumana dintho tse ntle tsa kgauta moo, ho kenyeletswa **tshukudu e nyenyane ya kgauta**.

items: E bontsha hore mebuso e meholo ya Afrika e ne e le teng mona pele Maeurope a fihla.
Tshukudu ya kgauta jwale ke letshwao le tummeng la histori ya Afrika Borwa.
Mapungubwe ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Lefatshe moeding le Zimbabwe le Botswana.

media.alt: Leralla le nang le hlooho e bataletseng le nang le sebopeho se senyenyane sa tshukudu ya kgauta ka pele ho lona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Seslaete sena se lokisa tumelo e fosahetseng e atileng ka ho bontsha mmuso o matla, o ruileng wa Afrika o neng o atlehile khale pele ho mehla ya bokoloni. Hatisa kgwebo (kgauta le lenaka la tlou di tsamaya hole ka lewatle) le tshukudu ya kgauta e le letlotlo. Baithuti ba Kereiti ya 6 ba tla ithuta Mapungubwe ka botlalo hamorao, kahoo o jala peo. Boloka ditlhaku tsa nako di tikolohile ('dilemo tse ka bang 700-800 tse fetileng').

slides.title: Sehlekehleke sa Robben
slides.lead: Sehlekehleke se senyenyane lewatleng haufi le Cape Town se ileng sa fetoha teronko e tummeng - le letshwao la tokoloho.

blocks.text: Ka dilemo tse ngata **Sehlekehleke sa Robben** e ne e le teronko. Nakong ya kgethollo (apartheid), baetapele ba neng ba lwanela ditokelo tse lekanang ba ne ba kwalletswe mona, hole le malapa a bona. **Nelson Mandela** o qetile dilemo tse ngata seleng se senyenyane sehlekehlekeng pele a lokollwa mme hamorao a eba mopresidente wa pele wa Afrika Borwa ya kgethilweng ka demokrasi.

items: Kajeno ke musiamo o rutang baeti ka ntwa ya tokoloho.
Ba bang ba batataisi ke batshwaruwa ba mehleng ba arolelanang dipale tsa bona.
E re hopotsa ho ananela tokoloho le ditokelo tseo re nang le tsona kajeno.

media.alt: Sehlekehleke se senyenyane se nang le lebone la lewatle, le Thaba ya Table Mountain hole.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebetsana le kgethollo (apartheid) ka hloko le ka bonolo bakeng sa Kereiti ya 5: batho ba bang ba ne ba tshwarwa hampe ka lebaka la mmala wa letlalo la bona, mme batho ba sebete ba sebeditse ho fetola seo. Hlalosa Sehlekehleke sa Robben e le sebaka sa maswabi le tshepo ka bobedi. Hokahanya le Letsatsi la Tokoloho / Nelson Mandela haeba baithuti ba mo tseba. Qoba dintlha tse tebileng; tsepamisa maikutlo sebeteng le boleng ba tokoloho.

slides.title: Botaki ba Majwe ba Drakensberg
slides.lead: Hodimo dithabeng tsa Drakensberg ho na le ditshwantsho tse dikete tse entsweng ke Baroa khale.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ke mohlaba wa dithaba tse phahameng ka ho fetisisa Afrika Borwa. Mahaha a wona le marulelo a majwe di na le ditshwantsho tse dikete tsa majwe (**rock paintings**) tse entsweng ke **Baroa** ba tsomang le ba bokellang. Ba ne ba taka batho, diphoofu, le ditumelo tsa bona ba sebedisa mebala ya tlholeho e tswang majweng, dimeleng le diphoofolong.

items: Lebitso uKhahlamba le bolela 'thibela ya marumo' ka isiZulu.
Ditshwantsho di na le dilemo tse makgolo esita le tse dikete.
Ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Lefatshe bakeng sa tlholeho ya sona le botaki ba sona ba kgale.

media.alt: Lebota la lehaha le nang le ditshwantsho tsa majwe tsa Baroa tsa phoofu le setshwantsho sa motho ya mathang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlahisa Baroa e le batho ba pele ba Afrika e ka boroa le bataki ba nang le tsebo le baphethi ba dipale. Hlalosa kamoo mmala o neng o etswa ka dintho tsa tlholeho (ochre, mashala, matute a dimela, mafura a diphoofolo). Phoofu e ne e le phoofolo ya bohlokwa haholo ditumelong tsa Baroa. Tshwara lefa la Baroa ka tlhompho - ditshwantsho tsena di halalela ho baahisane ba ditloholo. Hokahanya le dikgabiso tse betlilweng majweng tsa Kapa Leboya seslaeteng se latelang.

slides.title: Ho pholletsa le Karoo le Foreisetata
slides.lead: Boemelo bo bararo hape leetong la rona - Kapa Bochabela, Kapa Leboya le Foreisetata.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bochabela - Qunu
blocks.text: Maralla a matala moo Nelson Mandela a hodileng teng. Musiamo o Mthatha o pheta pale ya bophelo ba hae.

blocks.heading: Kapa Leboya - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Leralla le kwahetsweng ke dikgabiso tsa kgale tse betlilweng majweng, le hlokometsweng ke baahisane ba Baroa le Khoe.

blocks.heading: Foreisetata - Motse wa Basotho
blocks.text: Musiamo o phelang moo o ka bonang matlo a setso a Basotho a nang le marako a takilweng ka botle.

media.alt: Diketsahalo tse tharo tse nyenyane: maralla a phuthollohang, lejwe le betlilweng, le ntlwana e chitja e takilweng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Boemelo bona bo bararo bo atolosa leeto ho diprovense tse ding le mefuta e mengata ya lefa: sebaka sa tswalo sa motho (Kapa Bochabela), botaki ba kgale (dikgabiso tsa Kapa Leboya, tse betlilweng lejweng ho e-na le ho takwa ho lona), le lefa le phelang motseng o sebetsang (Foreisetata). Bontsha phapang pakeng tsa ditshwantsho tsa majwe (KZN) le dikgabiso tse betlilweng majweng (Kapa Leboya). [SME] Kenya dibaka tsa lehae tsa Kapa Bochabela kapa Foreisetata haeba di lokela baithuti ba hao hantle.

slides.title: Majwe a kgale le ngwana wa kgale
slides.lead: Boemelo ba rona ba ho qetela ba diprovense bo ya Leboya Bophirimela le Mpumalanga.

blocks.heading: Leboya Bophirimela - Taung
blocks.text: Ka 1924 lehata la mosaladi la ngwana wa kgale, 'Ngwana wa Taung', le fumanwe mona. Le thusitse lefatshe ho ithuta hore batho ba qadile Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa di na le tse ding tsa majwe a kgale ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng - a nang le dilemo tse ka bang dimilione tse 3 500 - jwale ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Lefatshe.

blocks.heading: Tlatsetso - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park le Constitution Hill leboya di hopola ntwa ya ditokelo tsa botho le demokrasi.

media.alt: Lehata le lenyenyane la mosaladi le haufi le dithaba tsa kgale tse nang le dikarolo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung e kgutlela morao sehloohong sa Cradle of Humankind - Afrika Borwa e bohareng ba pale ya tshimoloho ya batho. Barberton e bontsha lefa la tlholeho la mofuta o mong: majwe a kgale ka mokgwa o makatsang. Karete ya tlatsetso e o dumella ho bua ka dibaka tsa demokrasi tsa Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Netefatsa selemo sa ho fumanwa ha Ngwana wa Taung (1924) le dilemo tse tikolohileng tsa lejwe (dimilione tse ka bang 3 500) haeba o di qotsa ka lentswe.

slides.eyebrow: Lefa leo o ka le utlwang, la latswa le ho tantsha
slides.title: Lefa le phelang le Letsatsi la Lefa
slides.lead: Hase lefa lohle le dulang le kgutsitse musiamong - le leng la lona le phela ho seo re se etsang letsatsi le leng le le leng.

blocks.text: **Lefa le phelang** le fetiswa ho tswa ho bo-nkgono le bo-ntatemoholo ho ya ho batswadi le ho bana. Le kenyeletsa **dipuo tsa rona tsa semmuso tse 11**, dipina le ditantshi tsa rona, dipale tsa rona, diaparo tsa rona le dijo tseo re di ratang. Selemo se seng le se seng ka la **24 Loetse** Afrika Borwa e keteka **Letsatsi la Lefa**, ha re hlompha ditso tsohle tsa rona tse fapaneng.

items: Mmino le ditantshi jwalo ka isicathamiya, tantshi ya digumboot le amapiano.
Dijo tse jwalo ka pap, bunny chow, koeksisters, umngqusho le chakalaka.
Dipale, dithoko (izibongo) le dipapadi tse arolelanwang pakeng tsa malapa.

media.alt: Dinoto tsa mmino, moropa le sejana sa dijo se emelang lefa le phelang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Etsa seslaete sena sa hlaha ka ho fetisisa. Kopa baithuti ho arolelana pina, sejo kapa pale e tswang malapeng a bona. Hatisa hore lefa le phelang ke la batho bohle mme le dula le fetoha - amapiano ke lefa le lecha le etswang hona jwale. Hlalosa Letsatsi la Lefa ka bonolo: letsatsi la phomolo la setjhaba la ho keteka ditso tsohle tsa rona hammoho. Matlafatsa tlhompho bakeng sa diphapang.

slides.title: Ho hlokomela lefa la rona
slides.lead: Lefa ke la rona bohle, kahoo bohle re tlameha ho thusa ho le sireletsa.

blocks.text: Haeba meaho ya kgale e wa, ditshwantsho tsa majwe di ngwauwa, kapa dipale di sa hlola di phetwa, lefa leo le lahleha ka ho sa feleng. Ke ka lebaka leo re nang le **dimusiamo**, **dihopotso** le melao e sireletsang dibaka tse kgethehileng. Empa batho ba tlwaelehileng le bona ba a thusa - ka ho etela, ho ithuta le ho fetisa seo ba se tsebang.

items: O se ke wa ama kapa wa senya botaki ba majwe kapa dintho tsa kgale.
Etela dimusiamo le dibaka tsa lefa ho ithuta dipale tsa tsona.
Mamela baholo mme o fetisetse dipale tsa bona ho ba bang.

media.alt: Matsoho a mabedi a tshwereng moaho o monyenyane le sefate ka bonolo, a bontshang tlhokomelo ya lefa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlisa thuto ho 'ho joalo' ya yona - lefa le tswabeha mme le ka lahleha. Hokahanya dikeletso tse tharo le boitshwaro ba nnete leetong la sekolo. Matlafatsa tlhompho bakeng sa dibaka tse halalelang jwalo ka botaki ba majwe ba Baroa. O ka botsa baithuti ho bolela ntho e le nngwe eo ba tla e etsa ho sireletsa lefa. Sena se lokisetsa dipotso tsa tlhahlobo.

slides.eyebrow: Pheletso ya leeto - a re boele re hlahlobe
slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona leetong
slides.lead: Re tsamaile ho pholletsa le diprovense tsohle tse robong mme re kopane le lefa la tlholeho, la setso le le phelang.

blocks.text: Ho tloha mahaheng a **Cradle of Humankind** ho isa mmusong wa **Mapungubwe**, teronko ya **Sehlekehleke sa Robben** le dithaba tse takilweng tsa **Drakensberg**, lefa la Afrika Borwa le pheta pale ya batho ba lona bohle. Lefa ke la batho bohle, mme e mong le e mong a ka thusa ho le sireletsa.

blocks.question: Bolela dibaka tse tharo tse fapaneng tsa lefa mme o bolele hore na se seng le se seng se provenseng efe.
Hlalosa phapang pakeng tsa lefa la tlholeho, lefa la setso le lefa le phelang. Fana ka mohlala o le mong wa e nngwe le e nngwe.
Hobaneng ho le bohlokwa ho hlokomela lefa la rona? Fana ka mabaka a mabedi.

slides.notes: Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsweng kapa puisano ya tlelase. Potso ya 1 e hlahloba ho hopola dibaka le diprovense; potso ya 2 e hlahloba kgopolo ya mantlha ya mefuta e meraro ya lefa; potso ya 3 e hlahloba kutlwisiso ya hore na ke hobaneng lefa le le bohlokwa. Kabo ya matshwao e latela setaele sa CAPS sa Kgato ya Bohareng. Qetella ka ho hopotsa baithuti hore le bona ke karolo ya lefa le phelang la Afrika Borwa.
